Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Creeping Shadow]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — The Creeping Shadow is a hungry entity.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — The Creeping Shadow is free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Using the Optasia device now would mean staring straight into the Creeping Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The Creeping Shadow is associated with darkness, the void, existence as suffering, and death as mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Creeping Shadow created an empty space in the ocean.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — The Sleepless fear the Creeping Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — The Creeping Shadow faced the Outsider in the void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 24''' — The Creeping Shadow is a being that Kelarac might be on the same level as.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
